revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 27''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 27th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 27 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:27 رجب]] [[commons:Category:27 Rajab]] [[fa:۲۷ رجب]] [[id:27 Rajab]] [[sd:27 رجب]] [[ur:27 رجب]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 27''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 27th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 27 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:27 رجب]] [[commons:Category:27 Rajab]] [[fa:۲۷ رجب]] [[id:27 Rajab]] [[sd:27 رجب]] [[ur:27 رجب]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Rajab}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 27''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 27th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 27 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:27 رجب]] [[commons:Category:27 Rajab]] [[fa:۲۷ رجب]] [[id:27 Rajab]] [[sd:27 رجب]] [[ur:27 رجب]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 27''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 27th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 27 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:27 رجب]] [[commons:Category:27 Rajab]] [[fa:۲۷ رجب]] [[id:27 Rajab]] [[sd:27 رجب]] [[ur:27 رجب]]

{{Islamic Rajab}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rajab 27''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 27th day of the month [[Rajab]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 27 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rajab]] [[ar:27 رجب]] [[commons:Category:27 Rajab]] [[fa:۲۷ رجب]] [[id:27 Rajab]] [[sd:27 رجب]] [[ur:27 رجب]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121767)
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:27 رجب]][[ckb:٢٧ی ڕەجەب]][[commons:Category:27 Rajab]][[fa:۲۷ رجب]][[id:27 Rajab]][[ms:27 Rejab]][[sd:27 رجب]][[ur:27 رجب]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:27 رجب]][[ckb:٢٧ی ڕەجەب]][[sn:commons:Category:27 Rajab]][[fa:۲۷ رجب]][[id:27 Rajab]][[ms:27 Rejab]][[sd:27 رجب]][[ur:27 رجب]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Rajab}}

'''Rajab 27''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 27th day of the month [[Rajab]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]



[[ar:27 رجب]]
{{Commons Category|27 Rajab}}
[[fa:۲۷ رجب]]
[[id:27 Rajab]]
[[sd:27 رجب]]
[[ur:27 رجب]]
{{Islamic Calendar}}

[[Category:Days 27 of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]
[[Category:Rajab]]
[[Category:Wikidata has English label]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
